name: Crab Quiche
recipeIngredient: Or 1 LAYER PIE CRUST MIX FOR
7 1/2 oz FRESH LUMP CRABMEAT (REMOVE SHELLS AND CARTILAGE)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Prepare pie crust as directed. Place the pastry on the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie pan.
3. In a bowl, beat eggs, cream, onion, salt, and cayenne until blended.
4. Over the dough, sprinkle all of the crabmeat, then all of the cheese.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the crabmeat and cheese. Sprinkle with parsley.
6. Place the pan on a cookie sheet and set it in the middle rack of the oven.
7. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes, then reduce heat to 300°F. Continue baking for an additional 30 minutes or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove the quiche from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before cutting and serving. Yields 6 slices.
